About.title: About EastFront PK
About.subtitle: Islamic Resistance Movement Since 2011
About.introDescription: Since 2011, EastFront PK has been at the forefront of providing 24/7 real-time coverage of Islamic resistance movements. We deliver the latest political, military, and diplomatic developments through evidence-based news, polls, research articles, analytical writings, high-quality video footage, images, strategic maps, audio/video anthems, daily newspapers, and comprehensive books.
About.visionDescription: Preparation for the Appearance of Imam Mahdi (AS) through comprehensive Islamic resistance education, strategic analysis, and community building.
About.missionDescription: Wisdom, Strength, Integrity - Promoting Islamic resistance through evidence-based research, strategic analysis, and ethical journalism since 2011.
About.timelineDesc2013: Launched online platforms and social media presence
About.timelineDesc2015: Established dedicated research and analysis team
About.timelineDesc2021: Recognized as leading Islamic resistance research platform
About.teamExpertise1: Pakistan-Iran Relations, Middle East Defense Affairs
About.telegramDescription: Join our Telegram channel for instant updates, exclusive content, and real-time discussions.
About.telegramCTAText: Click to join our Telegram channel
About.whatsappDescription: Join our active WhatsApp community with 18+ groups for discussions, updates, and resource sharing
